description: Routing fixture for test-strategy authority-boundary coverage. Positive cases keep test-design intent with test-strategy; negative controls keep security auditing and completion-proof intents with their existing owners.

cases.prompt: Design the test strategy for this credentialed runner: prove allowed filesystem operations work and forbidden writes fail in the effective runtime.
Write a red-green regression test that reproduces this sandbox permission leak, then proves the hardened runtime blocks it without breaking allowed behavior.
Run semgrep static analysis on this repository, find credential-exposure vulnerabilities, and rank the security findings by severity.
The permission hardening is implemented. Before calling it done, verify the existing evidence is fresh and sufficient.
